Core_Claim: The central government has proposed a 5% service tax on healthcare in the recent budget, which will devastate the middle class and poor.
Original_Tweet: A tweet claims that the central government has proposed a 5% tax on healthcare in the recent #Budget.  #PIBFactCheck   This claim is #Fake.   The letter attached with the tweet is from year 2011 and is being shared out of context.
Image_Text: Jawhar Sircar @jawharsircar Agree fully with Dr Devi Shetty that Modi-Nirmala's service tax on health services will devastate the middle class and poor. Withdraw this tax! @AITCcofficial @MamataOfficial A Letter to the Aam Aadmi — About Misery Tax — Dear Friends, You are probably not aware that the Central Government has proposed a 5% service tax on healthcare in the recent budget. What are its implications? If you undergo any heart surgery, you will pay Rs.5,000 to 10,000 or more as service tax. If you are unfortunate and suffer from cancer, then you will be charged anywhere excess Rs.20,000 as service tax. Do not be misled by the Government's justification that only air-conditioned hospitals will be charged this tax and hence only rich patients will be taxed. For your information, not a single operation theatre or blood bank can actually function without air-conditioning. The Government spends less than 1% of its GDP on healthcare. The only other government in the world which spends less than us is the Government of Pakistan. 80% of our national healthcare cost is borne through private expenditure. It is Government's duty to provide us with affordable healthcare instead of increasing the cost by adding more taxes. Even our poorest villagers who pay Rs.5 to 10 for micro health insurance are charged 8% service tax. My fellow citizens, quality healthcare is beyond the reach of most of us partly because hospitals pay sales tax, VAT, electricity tax, Every day, we see patients who have sold their homes, borrowed money and their means to save their loved ones. We must all rise and not have the heart to tell them that today they will be charged an additional Rs.5,000 to 10,000 as service tax. In the process, we will produce the largest number of widows in the world. Healthcare cost is commonest cause of indebtedness. We must all rise in protest. So, let us choose 5th of March as 'Misery Day'. Every citizen to assemble near the Governor's house of every state with a petition to roll back this 'Misery Tax'. Please pass on this request to everybody you know. Thanking You, Dr. Devi Shetty, Narayana Hrudayalaya devishetty@hrudayalaya.com For more information, please visit www.narayanahospitals.com

Core_Claim: A fake order issued in the name of RBI claims that the exchange facility for Indian demonetized currency notes for foreign citizens has been extended until April 30, 2021.
Original_Tweet: An order issued in the name of  @RBI  claims that exchange facility for Indian demonetized currency notes for foreign citizens has been extended  #PIBFactCheck   This order is #fake  The exchange facility for Indian demonetized currency notes for foreign citizens ended in 2017.
Image_Text: भारतीय रिज़र्व बैंक RESERVE BANK OF INDIA www.rbi.org.in RBI/2020-21/366 A.P. (DIR Series) Circular No.61 The Chairman and Managing Director / Chief Executive Officer All Scheduled Commercial Banks including Regional Rural Banks / Urban Co-operative Banks / State Co-operative Banks / District Central Co-operative Banks / Local Area Banks / Payment Banks / Small Finance Banks / National Payments Corporation of India Madam / Sir, WARNING NOTICE Final Exchange facility to foreign citizens 1. Attention of Authorized Persons is invited to the Authorized Persons (DIR Series) Circular No.16 dated November 9, 2016 giving certain exemptions to foreign tourists visiting India. In supersession of instructions issued therein, it has been decided that foreign citizens (i.e. foreign passport holders) should be given a final facility for exchange foreign exchange for Indian demonetized currency notes. 2. Further, it is strictly warned all the Authorized Persons that the exchange of demonetized currency notes exchange will be ended finally on 31st March, 2021. 3. Hence, now onwards, the Reserve Bank of India in consultation with the Governments of other (neighboring) countries citizens new exchange is to take place, to change the Indian demonetized currency till April 30, 2021 on 4. This directive is issued under Section 10 (2) read with Section 18 of Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007 (Act 51 of 2007). Yours faithfully, A.K. Pandey (A.K. Pandey) Chairman Chief General Manager, FED, RBI भुगतान और निपटान प्रणाली विभाग, भारतीय रिज़र्व बैंक, केंद्रीय कार्यालय भवन, शहीद भगत सिंह मार्ग, फोर्ट, मुंबई - 400001 Department of Payment and Settlement Systems, Central Office, 14th Floor, Central Office Building, Shahid Bhagat Singh Road, Fort, Mumbai - 400001

Core_Claim: The Modi government secretly sent 200 tons of RBI gold abroad and mortgaged 268 tons of gold, keeping the matter confidential.
Original_Tweet: दावा    RBI का 200 टन सोना विदेश भेजा गया।   268 टन सोना गिरवी रखा।  #PIBFactCheck  यह दावा फ़र्ज़ी है।   @RBI  ने इन खबरों को तथ्यात्मक रूप से गलत बताया है।  अधिक जानकारी के लिए पढ़ें   https:// rbidocs.rbi.org.in/rdocs/PressRel ease/PDFs/PR26009959D5EA1C4144F58BD92EB704AB8B02.PDF …
Image_Text: यह दावा फ़र्ज़ी है। RBI का 200 टन सोना चोरी-छुपे विदेश भेजा गया 268 टन सोना गिरवी रखा मोदी सरकार ने पूरे मामले को गोपनीय रखा नईदिल्ली (ब्यूरो)। ईमानदार और पारदर्शी सरकार का ढिंढोरा पीटने वाली नरेन्द्र मोदी सरकार ने विदेशों में 268 टन सोना गिरवी रख दिया जिसकी किसी को कानों-कान भनक तक नहीं लगने दी गई। इस बात को लगभग साढ़े 4 साल पूरे होने को हैं, जिसका अब आरटीआई के माध्यम से बड़ा खुलासा हुआ तो मोदी सरकार की मुश्किलें बढ़ती नजर आ रही हैं। खोजी पत्रकार नवनीत चतुर्वेदी ने आरटीआई के जरिए खुलासे का दावा करते हुए कहा कि मोदी सरकार ने जुलाई 2014 में देश का 268 टन सोना विदेशों में गिरवी रख दिया है, जिसके प्रमाणित दस्तावेज भी उनके पास हैं। उन्होंने दावा किया है कि रिजर्व बैंक में रखा गया सोना जिसको जून 2011 की रिपोर्ट में सोना पूरी तरह से रिजर्व बैंक में रखा पाया गया, लेकिन 2015 कि रिपोर्ट में इस बात का खुलासा हुआ और आरबीआई की बैलेंस शीट में 268 टन सोना कम दर्शाया गया, लेकिन इतने बड़े मामले को मोदी सरकार ने पूरी तरह से गोपनीय रखा जबकि आरटीआई के जरिए नवनीत चतुर्वेदी ने किया बड़ा खुलासा इससे पहले यूपीए सरकार के प्रमुख मनमोहन सिंह ने एक समाचार बाद तत्कालीन प्रधानमंत्री मनमोहनसिंह प्रसाद में सोना गिरवी रखने की बात स्वीकार की थी, लेकिन मोदी सरकार ने अपने पूरे कार्यकाल में सोने के खुलासे को छुपाए रखा अब इस खुलासे होने के बाद मोदी सरकार की मुश्किलें बढ़ती नजर आ रही हैं। देश के प्रधानमंत्री देश के डूबते संस्थानों की सूची जेट एयरवेज 8 हजार करोड़ का घाटा (बंद), इंडियन एयरलाइन 5 हजार 340 करोड़ का घाटा, एयर इंडिया 8 हजार करोड़ का घाटा, पंजाब नेशनल बैंक 280 करोड़ का घाटा, रेलवे 89 हजार करोड़ का घाटा, 36 कंपनियां फेल छोड़कर भागे। @PIBFactCheck /PIBFactCheck +918799711259 @Socialmedia@pib.gov.in

Core_Claim: Govt. Of India has decided to amalgamate Baroda Uttar Pradesh Bank, Aryavart Bank & Prathama Uttar Pradesh Gramin Bank into a single Regional Rural Bank named Baroda U.P. Bank.
Original_Tweet: Claim: Govt. Of India has decided to amalgamate Baroda Uttar Pradesh Bank, Aryavart Bank & Prathama Uttar Pradesh Gramin Bank into a single Regional Rural Bank named Baroda U.P. Bank  #PIBFactCheck  - This Notification is #FAKE  - No such decision has been made by  @FinMinIndia
Image_Text: 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Financial Services) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17th July, 2023 S.O. 4268(E).—Whereas the Central Government, after consultation with the National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD), Government of Uttar Pradesh and the Bank of Baroda, Bank of India and Punjab National Bank, being the Sponsor Banks of Baroda Uttar Pradesh Bank, Aryavart Bank and Prathama Uttar Pradesh Gramin Bank, is of the opinion that it is necessary in the public interest and in the interest of the development of the area served by the aforesaid Regional Rural Banks and also in the interest of the said Regional Rural Banks themselves, that the said Regional Rural Banks should be amalgamated into a single Regional Rural Bank; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 23A of the Regional Rural Banks Act, 1976 (21 of 1976) (hereinafter referred to as “the Act”), the Central Government hereby provides for the amalgamation of the said Regional Rural Banks into a single Regional Rural Bank which shall come into effect on and from the first day of April, 2024 (hereinafter referred to as the “effective date of amalgamation”) with such constitution, property, powers, rights, interests, authorities and privileges; and with such liabilities, duties and obligations as specified hereunder:— 1. Baroda Uttar Pradesh Bank, Aryavart Bank and Prathama Uttar Pradesh Gramin Bank (hereinafter referred to as “the transferor Regional Rural Banks”) sponsored by the Bank of Baroda, Bank of India and Punjab National Bank in the State of Uttar Pradesh are hereby amalgamated into a single Regional Rural Bank which shall be called as Baroda U.P. Bank (hereinafter referred to as “the transferee Regional Rural Bank”) with its head office at Gorakhpur under the sponsorship of Bank of Baroda. 2. The authorized capital of the transferee Regional Rural Bank shall be rupees two thousand crore and the issued and paid-up capital shall be rupees one hundred crore number of fully paid shares of rupees ten each. The subscribed share capital of the transferor Regional Rural Bank shall be equal to the subscribed share capital of the transferor Regional Rural Banks and, therefore, the entire subscribed share capital of the transferor Regional Rural Banks shall be deemed to have been transferred to and shall be deemed as subscribed share capital of the transferee Regional Rural Bank.

Core_Claim: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has cancelled the license of Abhyudaya Co-operative Bank Ltd., Mumbai.
Original_Tweet: A Press Release, dated 25 October 2023, being shared online, alleges that  @RBI  has canceled the license of Abhyudaya Co-operative Bank Ltd.  #PIBFactCheck  This Press Release is fake  RBI has not issued any such Press release  For more info visit:  http:// rbi.org.in
Image_Text: भारतीय रिज़र्व बैंक RESERVE BANK OF INDIA वेबसाइट: www.rbi.org.in Website: www.rbi.org.in ई-मेल/email: helpdoc@rbi.org.in संचार विभाग, केंद्रीय कार्यालय, शहीद भगत सिंह मार्ग, फोर्ट, मुंबई - 400 001 फोन/Phone 022 - 2266 0502 October 25, 2023 RBI cancels the licence of Abhyudaya Co-operative Bank Ltd., Mumbai The Reserve Bank of India (RBI), vide order dated October 25, 2023, has cancelled the licence of Abhyudaya Co-operative Bank Ltd., Mumbai. Consequently, the bank ceases to carry on banking business, with effect from the close of business on October 26, 2023. The Commissioner and Registrar of Cooperative, Maharashtra has also been requested to issue an order for winding up the bank and appoint a liquidator for the bank. RBI cancelled the licence of the bank as: i) The bank does not have adequate capital and earning prospects. As such, it does not comply with the provisions of Section 11(1) and Section 22 (3) (d) read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949. ii) The bank has failed to comply with the requirements of Sections 22(3) (a), 22 (3) (b), 22(3)(c), 22(3)(d) and 22(3)(e) read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949. iii) The continuance of the bank is prejudicial to the interests of its depositors; iv) The bank with its present financial position would be unable to pay its present depositors in full; and v) Public interest would be adversely affected if the bank is allowed to carry on its banking business any further. 2. Consequent to the cancellation of its licence, Abhyudaya Co-operative Bank Ltd., Mumbai is prohibited from conducting the business of 'banking' which includes, among other things, acceptance of deposits and repayment of deposits as defined in Section 5(b) read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 with immediate effect. 3. On liquidation, every depositor would not be entitled to receive deposit insurance claim amount of his/her deposits from Deposit Insurance and Credit Guarantee Corporation (DICGC) that is non-payment of premium. As per the data submitted by the bank, 99.92% of the depositors are not entitled to receive full amount of their deposits from DICGC. Press Release: 2023-2024/1020 (Yogesh Dayal) Chief General Manager

Core_Claim: Fraudulent communications falsely claim that services like KYC, bank accounts, or utility connections require immediate updates or payments to avoid disconnection, often through impersonation, or involve threats like sextortion.

Image_Text: PIB FACT CHECK Now report Fraudulent Communications with CHAKSHU Empowering Citizens to Fight Fraud Together Report common fraudulent communications on CHAKSHU KYC expiry/update scams Bank account/wallet/SIM update scams Gas/electricity connection scams Impersonation scams (government official/relative) Sextortion Disconnection of mobile numbers by DoT 3 Easy steps to report Step 1 Visit the Chakshu Facility on the Sanchar Saathi portal Step 2 Provide details of the fraudulent communication Step 3 Submit the report

Original_Tweet: दावा : केंद्र सरकार द्वारा फोन कॉल्स और सोशल मीडिया ऐप्स के लिए 'नए संचार नियम' लागू किए जा रहे हैं।   #PIBFactCheck   यह दावा #फर्जी है।    केंद्र सरकार द्वारा ऐसे कोई नियम लागू नहीं किए गए हैं।    कृपया ऐसी अपुष्ट जानकारियों को साझा न करें।    केंद्र सरकार से संबंधित
Image_Text: कल से लागू होंगे व्हाट्सप्प और फोन कॉल के नए संचार नियमसर्वाहित भारत01. सभी कॉल रिकॉर्डिंग होगी।02. सभी कॉल रिकॉर्डिंग सेव हो जाएगी।03. व्हाट्सप्प, फेसबुक, ट्विटर और सभी सोशल मीडिया पर नजर रखी जाएगी।04. जो नहीं जानते उन सभी को सूचित करें।05. आपके उपकरण मंत्रालय से जुड़ेंगे।06. संविधान रहने किसी को गलत मैसेज न भेजें।07. आप, भाईचारे, रिश्तेदारों, दोस्तों को बताएं कि आप सोशल मीडिया पर सोशल मीडिया पर कम ही चलाएं।08. राजनीतिक या समस्यात्मक मामलों... आदि सरकार याप्रधानमंत्री के समक्ष आपकी कोई भी पोस्ट या वीडियो। न भेजें09. वर्तमान में किसी भी राजनीतिक या धार्मिक विषय पर संदेश लिखना या भेजना अपराध है... ऐसा करने पर बिना वारंट के गिरफ्तारी हो सकती है।10. पुलिस जारी करेगी नोटिस... इसके बाद साइबर क्राइम... इसके बाद की कार्रवाई बेहद गंभीर है।11. कृपया आप सभी, ग्रुप सदस्य, एडमिन... कृपया इस मामले पर विचार करें।12. सावधान रहे कि गलत संदेश न जाए और सभी को बताएं और मामले का ध्यान रखें।13. कृपया इसे शेयर करें। समूहों को अधिक जागरूक एवं सतर्क रहना चाहिए। व्हाट्सप्प के बारे में ग्रुप सदस्यों केलिए महत्वपूर्ण जानकारी... जानकारी व्हाट्सप्प पर1. - संदेश भेजा गया2. - संदेश प्राप्त3. दो नीले - संदेश पढ़े4. तीन नीले - सरकार को संदेश नोट5. दो नीले और एक लाल - सरकार आपके खिलाफ कार्रवाई कर सकती है6. एक नीला और दो लाल - सरकार आपकी जानकारी सत्यापित कर रही है7. तीन लाल - सरकार ने आपके खिलाफ कार्यवाही शुरू कर दी है और आपको जल्द ही अदालत का समन मिलेगा।एक जिम्मेदार नागरिक बने और अपने दोस्तों के साथ साझा करें। महत्वपूर्ण है कि जल्द अगले ग्रुप में भेजें...।
